label: Rule Vagueness Drift
description: Rules with low specificity produce unpredictable simulation behavior. Triggers match too broadly, effects are unclear.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Rule specificity is below 30% with more than 3 rules declared.
causal_translation.rule_text: Vague rules match too many scenarios. The simulation becomes unpredictable — users cannot reason about what will happen.
causal_translation.shift_text: Rule behavior becomes non-deterministic from the user's perspective. Trust erodes.
causal_translation.effect_text: World integrity reduced by 40%. Rules: NON-DETERMINISTIC.
